title: Flow Members Verification (Stage 5a)
description: JSON Schema for the LLM verification call at Stage 5a.5. The model returns a re-ordered (or unchanged) members list plus a notes blob. The skill cross-checks that the returned members are a subset of the AST-walked candidates; on disagreement the AST result wins (guards against hallucinated members). The notes string becomes the ## Notes body section of the flow contract.

members.description: Ordered UUIDs. >=2 entries: trigger + >=1 participant. First element is the trigger.

notes.description: Numbered invocation walkthrough. Becomes the ## Notes body of the flow contract. See contract-ide-demo/.contracts/flow-delete-account.md for canonical format.
